com.hp.workpath.api.access

Class AuthenticationAttributes.AuthenticationAttributesBuilder<T extends AuthenticationAttributes.AuthenticationAttributesBuilder<T>>

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.hp.workpath.api.access.AuthenticationAttributes.AuthenticationAttributesBuilder<T>
  • Direct Known Subclasses:
    AuthenticationAttributes.LdapBuilder, AuthenticationAttributes.NovellBuilder, AuthenticationAttributes.OtherBuilder, AuthenticationAttributes.PinBuilder, AuthenticationAttributes.WindowsBuilder, AuthenticationAttributes.WindowsSmartCardBuilder
    Enclosing class:
    AuthenticationAttributes

    public abstract static class AuthenticationAttributes.AuthenticationAttributesBuilder<T extends AuthenticationAttributes.AuthenticationAttributesBuilder<T>>
extends java.lang.Object

    Base builder of AuthenticationAttributes which contain mandatory parameters for building authentication information. Implementations of this class provide different authentication information of a particular type.

    Since:
    API 2

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      AuthenticationAttributesBuilder() 

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      T addUserProperty(java.lang.String name, java.lang.String value)
      Sets the custom user property.
      AuthenticationAttributes build()
      Combines all of the attributes in this into a AuthenticationAttributes object.
      T setDisplayName(java.lang.String displayName)
      Sets user name for display purposes.
      T setExchangeMailboxUri(java.lang.String exchangeMailboxUri)
      Sets Exchange Mailbox URI.
      T setFullyQualifiedName(java.lang.String fullyQualifiedName)
      Sets fully qualified name.
      T setHomeFolderPath(java.lang.String homeFolderPath)
      Sets user home folder path.
      T setPassword(java.lang.String password)
      Sets user's password (or PIN) as gathered by the authentication process (min length=1, max length=128, may be null).
      T setSAMAccountName(java.lang.String sAMAccountName)
      Sets sAMAccountName.
      T setSidString(java.lang.String sidString)
      Sets the text format (SDDL) of the user's Microsoft Security Descriptor.
      T setUserDomain(java.lang.String userDomain)
      Sets user domain.
      T setUserEmail(java.lang.String userEmail)
      Sets user email.
      T setUserName(java.lang.String userName)
      Sets user name.
      T setUserOverridesAttributes(UserOverridesAttributes userOverridesAttributes)
      Sets user overrides of default device settings applied after sign in successfully.
      T setUserPreferencesAttributes(UserPreferencesAttributes userPreferencesAttributes)
      Sets user preferences applied after sign in successfully.
      T setUserPrincipalName(java.lang.String userPrincipalName)
      Sets user principal name.

      • setPassword

        public T setPassword(java.lang.String password)

        Sets user's password (or PIN) as gathered by the authentication process (min length=1, max length=128, may be null). May be used by workflow applications to impersonate the user (only if configured/allowed by the administrator).

        Parameters:
        password - password
        Returns:
        this builder for method chaining
        Since:
        API 2

      • addUserProperty

        public T addUserProperty(java.lang.String name,
                         java.lang.String value)
        Sets the custom user property.
        Parameters:
        name - property name. The key (or name) of the item (min length=1, max length=512).
        value - property value. The value of the item as a string (min length=1, max length=512, may be null).
        Returns:
        this builder for method chaining
        Since:
        API 2

      • setUserPreferencesAttributes

        public T setUserPreferencesAttributes(UserPreferencesAttributes userPreferencesAttributes)
        Sets user preferences applied after sign in successfully.
        Parameters:
        userPreferencesAttributes - user preferences attributes
        Returns:
        this builder for method chaining
        Since:
        API 2

      • setUserOverridesAttributes

        public T setUserOverridesAttributes(UserOverridesAttributes userOverridesAttributes)
        Sets user overrides of default device settings applied after sign in successfully.
        Parameters:
        userOverridesAttributes - user overrides attributes
        Returns:
        this builder for method chaining
        Since:
        API 2

      • build

        public AuthenticationAttributes build()
                               throws CapabilitiesExceededException
        Combines all of the attributes in this into a AuthenticationAttributes object.
        Returns:
        AuthenticationAttributes object containing all of the attributes.
        Throws:
        CapabilitiesExceededException - if attributes are out of supported range.
        Since:
        API 2
